title: riedelia lanata
intro: Riedelia lanata is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to Papua New Guinea and surrounding islands. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and stems, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Riedelia lanata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
